diff: The list of authorized forum accounts is defined as Active Data in [A.2.7.1.1.1.1.4.0.6.1 - Current Authorized Forum Accounts](b71564fd-22e0-4c69-99d1-5b23fc1fa329).
The Active Data is updated as follows:
- The Responsible Party is the entity to which the registration pertains.
- The Update Process must follow the protocol for 'Direct Edit'.
description: Establishes registration, disclosure, and enforcement requirements for Sky Forum accounts used in a governance capacity, so the community can trust that posts made on behalf of an entity come from its authorized representatives.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
